strategyMarkdown:
## Kill Target
Warrior

## Win Condition
Poly the Druid and burst the Warrior while unhealed. Rogue opens with Cheap Shot → Kidney Shot chain. Mage keeps Poly on Druid — re-poly immediately if it breaks.

---

## Key Notes

- If Warrior pops Recklessness, use Frost Nova + Blink to reset distance.
- Watch for Druid going Bear Form to trinket Poly — have CS ready.
- If Warrior trinkets, re-CC with Gouge → Blind rotation.
- Don't tunnel — switch to Druid briefly to force cooldown usage, then back to Warrior.

## Kill Target
Warrior

## Win Condition
Counterspell / Silence the Priest during burst windows. Rogue bursts Warrior. Mage applies Frostbolt slow and interrupts every heal possible.

---

## Key Notes

- Shadow Priest variant: Respect Psychic Scream. Break fear with Trinket or Berserker Rage if available.
- Holy Priest: Easier target due to no shadow form — CS on Greater Heal wins.
- Warrior must never be in range to land a full Bladestorm without being Frost Nova'd.

## Kill Target
Either — prefer enemy Mage

## Win Condition
This is a mirror. CS the enemy Mage to prevent burst. Your Mage should stay near your Rogue to benefit from Smoke Screen. Whoever lands the first non-trinketed CC chain usually wins.

---

## Key Notes

- Counterspell wars are the core of this matchup — never waste yours.
- Detect Invisibility or Detect Traps can reveal stealthed enemy Rogue early.
- If enemy Rogue opens on your Mage, Frost Nova + Blink immediately.
- Don't both target the same player until CC is locked on the other.

## Kill Target
Warrior

## Win Condition
Heavy cleave comp — they will train your Rogue hard. Your Mage must peel with Frost Nova and sheep the enemy Rogue. Kill Warrior while enemy Rogue is CCd.

---

## Key Notes

- This matchup is about surviving their initial burst then recovering control.
- Ice Block is a critical survival tool — save it for Rogue + Warrior overlap.
- Your Rogue should use Evasion when double-trained to survive the burst window.
- Once you get them separated with Poly, the Warrior should die quickly.

## Kill Target
Warlock

## Win Condition
Interrupt Drain Life with Counterspell. Rogue bursts Warlock with Blind on Priest. Silence / CS prevents Priest from healing during burst window.

---

## Key Notes

- Fear is the biggest threat — both players need PvP Trinkets. Trinket Fear immediately to avoid chain CC.
- Warlock will try to Curse of Exhaustion + Drain Life kite — Blink is your answer.
- If Priest is Shadow: they deal significant damage themselves; consider killing Priest first if Warlock is defensive spec.
- Counterspell should be saved for big heals (Greater Heal / Flash Heal) not DoT casts.

## Kill Target
Warlock

## Win Condition
Poly the Druid repeatedly. Rogue bursts Warlock. Mage interrupts Drain Life with Counterspell. This is a manageable matchup if Poly is kept on Druid.

---

## Key Notes

- Druid will use Nature's Grasp defensively — don't stand in melee as Mage.
- Warlock Fear: trinket immediately, do not let them chain Fear into a Poly from Druid.
- If Druid swaps to Tree of Life, expect sustained healing — switch damage to Druid briefly to force a defensive cooldown.
- Counterspell Drain Life, not Shadowbolt — the sustained drain is the real threat.

## Kill Target
Warlock

## Win Condition
Frost Nova the Warlock, Rogue + Mage burst while Rogue has the enemy Rogue controlled. CC chain the Warlock during burst windows.

---

## Key Notes

- Enemy Rogue will attempt to Blind your Rogue at the same time you try to Blind theirs — anticipate the timing.
- Warlock will Fear — your PvP Trinket should break it. Rogue uses Berserker Rage if available.
- Rogue/Warlock is a sustained pressure comp. Don't let them kite you — stay aggressive.

## Kill Target
Druid

## Win Condition
One of the hardest matchups. The enemy Druid has unmatched mobility and mana regeneration. Focus sustained pressure on the Druid — force cooldown usage. Your Rogue should Blind the enemy Rogue when he tries to peel for Druid.

---

## Key Notes

- Druid will shift out of Polymorph instantly — don't spam Poly. Use it to buy a GCD during burst.
- Druid's HoTs mean you need to burst hard after a CS, not spread damage.
- If Druid goes into Moonkin, treat him as a damage dealer and consider swapping target.
- Patience is key — they play for attrition, you need to create 1v1 windows.

## Kill Target
Enemy Mage

## Win Condition
CS the enemy Mage immediately on burst windows. Your Mage mirrors their Mage while your Rogue kills them. Poly the Druid to prevent healing.

---

## Key Notes

- Enemy Mage will attempt to CS your Mage — position behind a pillar to LoS.
- If enemy Mage has Ice Block, coordinate the burst to burn it, then finish.
- Druid will spam Rejuvenation on the enemy Mage — your burst needs to overcome HoT healing.

## Kill Target
Enemy Mage

## Win Condition
CS the enemy Mage during Rogue burst windows. Blind the Priest. Enemy Mage dies before Priest can recover. Clean up Priest after.

---

## Key Notes

- Shadow Priest adds heavy pressure — don't let Vampiric Embrace sustain them.
- If Holy Priest: straightforward. CS Greater Heal, Rogue kills Mage fast.
- Enemy Mage will try to CS your Mage too — be ready to Blink out of burst range.

## Kill Target
Hunter

## Win Condition
Avoid Freeze Trap entirely. Poly the Druid, Rogue closes on Hunter. Use Blink to break Frost Trap if caught. Burst Hunter during Druid Poly.

---

## Key Notes

- Hunter has Deterrence — coordinate burst to avoid wasting it.
- Druid will Innervate after mana drain — don't waste CC on low-mana Druid.
- Watch for Hunter's Scatter Shot breaking your Rogue's CCs.
- Freezing Trap on your Rogue — trinket or wait out the short duration.

## Kill Target
Hunter

## Win Condition
Silence / CS Priest to prevent healing. Rogue closes on Hunter and bursts. Mage uses Blink to close gap if Hunter Disengage.

---

## Key Notes

- Scatter Shot into Freeze Trap is their win condition — never stand together as a team.
- Rogue uses Blind on Priest during burst window on Hunter.
- Shadow Priest + Hunter can have insane sustained DPS — don't let the fight go long.

## Kill Target
Hunter

## Win Condition
Smoke Screen negates Hunter's ranged damage on your Rogue. Poly the enemy Rogue briefly while your Rogue kills Hunter. Mage Frost Nova keeps Hunter in place.

---

## Key Notes

- Smoke Screen is extremely strong here — use it aggressively during burst.
- Enemy Rogue will try to Blind your Mage to prevent Poly. Rogue should Blind their Rogue first.
- Hunter's Disengage + Trap combination: never stand on a blue circle (Frost Trap already placed).

## Kill Target
Hunter

## Win Condition
Sheep the Warrior, kill Hunter. Heavy cleave comp but both targets are controllable. Frost Nova Warrior to prevent him reaching your Mage.

---

## Key Notes

- Keep Warrior sheeped — he's the cleave threat, not the primary kill target.
- Hunter Disengage makes burst tricky — use Rogue's Cheap Shot to lock him down.
- Counterspell is not very useful here (Hunter is physical) — use it to interrupt Warrior Shouts if needed.

## Kill Target
Shaman

## Win Condition
Interrupt Earth Shield application with Counterspell or Kick. Poly the enemy Rogue when Shaman is in danger. Burst Shaman during CS lockout.

---

## Key Notes

- Shaman's Purge will remove your Mage's Mana Shield — reapply when safe.
- Grounding Totem negates Poly — Kick it or wait for it to expire before casting.
- Shaman healing is powerful but interruptible — CS on every Healing Wave cast.
- Enemy Rogue will peel for Shaman with Blind on your Mage.

## Kill Target
Enemy Mage

## Win Condition
CS the enemy Mage, Rogue bursts. Shaman alone cannot sustain their Mage under coordinated pressure with healing interrupts.

---

## Key Notes

- Grounding Totem will eat your Poly — always destroy it before sheeping.
- Shaman will Wind Shear your Mage's Frostbolts — be aware of interrupt lockout.
- Focus the enemy Mage hard — Shaman's off-heals aren't enough if Mage dies fast.

## Kill Target
Warrior

## Win Condition
Interrupt Shaman heals with CS. Frost Nova Warrior, burst him down. Rogue uses Blind on Shaman during burst.

---

## Key Notes

- Shaman's totems provide powerful utility — destroy Grounding Totem before every Poly attempt.
- Warrior's charge gap closer is dangerous for Mage — keep pillars between you.

## Kill Target
Shaman

## Win Condition
Rogue locks down Shaman with stuns while Mage CS interrupts heals. Hunter is largely ignored until Shaman dies.

---

## Key Notes

- Grounding Totem will eat Poly — kick it before attempting CC.
- Scatter Shot from Hunter will break your Rogue's CC chains — stay spread.
- Once Shaman dies, 1v1 Hunter with Rogue is straightforward.

## Kill Target
Warrior

## Win Condition
CS Divine Shield (Bubble) the moment Paladin casts it. With Bubble CS'd, burst Warrior immediately. Rogue should save Kidney Shot for the post-bubble window.

---

## Key Notes

- This is one of the hardest matchups. Paladin has near-unlimited mana and cannot be out-healed.
- Counterspell timing on Bubble is everything — a missed CS loses the game.
- You cannot outlast them on mana. Create burst windows and commit fully.
- Warrior will be very aggressive — use Frost Nova + Blink to peel off your Mage.

## Kill Target
Paladin

## Win Condition
CS Divine Shield. Rogue bursts Paladin while enemy Rogue is Polyed. Paladin dies before they can recover without bubble.

---

## Key Notes

- Enemy Rogue's Blind will be aimed at your Mage — anticipate and position behind pillars.
- Without bubble, Paladins are surprisingly killable under coordinated burst.
- Watch for Paladin's Repentance — it's a cast that CCs your Rogue. Kick or LoS it.

## Kill Target
Warlock

## Win Condition
Save CS for Divine Shield. Fear from Warlock is the primary threat — trinket it. Rogue Blinds Paladin while Mage bursts Warlock with CS on Drain Life.

---

## Key Notes

- Paladin/Warlock sustains through Fear + slow Paladin heals. Create burst windows after CS'ing bubble.
- Warlock's Curse of Exhaustion makes kiting difficult — Blink is critical.

## Kill Target
Enemy Mage

## Win Condition
CS the enemy Mage. Rogue burst kills Mage while Paladin is LoS'd behind a pillar. Paladin cannot heal what he cannot see.

---

## Key Notes

- This is a LoS-heavy matchup. Force Paladin to walk out from behind pillars to heal.
- CS Divine Shield to prevent Paladin from saving the Mage during burst.
- Enemy Mage's Ice Block gives them one free emergency — plan burst around burning it first.

## Kill Target
Hunter

## Win Condition
CS Paladin's Divine Shield / heals. Rogue closes on Hunter using pillars. Freeze Trap avoidance is critical.

---

## Key Notes

- Hunter Disengage + Paladin peel is their defensive rotation. Aggressive re-engagement after every disengage.
- Paladin's Repentance on your Rogue enables Hunter free damage — kick Repentance cast.
- If both healers (Divine Shield + Mend Pet) are active simultaneously, sit on Hunter and wait them out.

## Kill Target
Priest

## Win Condition
Blind the enemy Rogue. Rogue + Mage burst the Priest with CS on heals. Without a Rogue peel, Priest dies quickly under burst.

---

## Key Notes

- Priest's Psychic Scream: stand near pillars to LoS the fear.
- Shadow Priest variant: Respectable damage output — CS Vampiric Touch/Mind Blast, not just heals.
- Enemy Rogue's Blind will target your Mage — position carefully.

## Kill Target
Warlock

## Win Condition
Interrupt Shaman heals. Rogue Blinds Shaman during Warlock burst. CS Drain Life on Warlock.

---

## Key Notes

- Grounding Totem will absorb Poly — destroy it before CCing Shaman.
- Warlock Fear is the primary threat — PvP Trinket the Fear and re-engage.
- Wind Shear from Shaman will lock out your Mage's Frost school — avoid standing in Shaman's melee range.
